business.name: Acme Construction
business.description: Brisbane-based construction company delivering quality residential and commercial builds since 2009.

hero.headline: Brisbane's Most Trusted Builders
hero.subheadline: Quality construction for residential and commercial projects. On time, on budget, no surprises.

services.headline: What We Do
services.subheadline: End-to-end construction and trade services built around your project.

items.title: New Construction
items.description: Full residential and commercial builds from slab to handover.

page.heroSub: From slab to handover — full residential and commercial builds managed start to finish.
page.intro: Whether you're building your first home, expanding a commercial premises, or putting up an industrial shed, Acme Construction manages the entire process. We coordinate every trade, handle council approvals, and keep you informed at every milestone.

steps.title: Design & Quote
steps.description: We review your plans and provide a detailed fixed-price quote.

steps.title: Council Approvals
steps.description: We handle all DA and BA applications, liaising with council.

steps.title: Construction
steps.description: Our team builds to spec with fortnightly progress reports.

steps.title: Handover & Warranty
steps.description: Thorough walkthrough, snag resolution, and full warranty.

items.question: How long does a new home take to build?
items.answer: Typically 9–14 months depending on size and council processing times.

items.question: Do you handle the council approval process?
items.answer: Yes — we manage all DA and BA applications as part of our service.

items.question: Can I supply my own materials?
items.answer: In some cases, yes. We'll advise which items you can source and which we need to procure.

items.question: What warranties do you provide?
items.answer: Full structural warranty per QBCC requirements, plus our own 12-month defects liability period.

cta.headline: Ready to Build?
cta.subheadline: Get a free consultation and fixed-price quote.

items.title: Renovations
items.description: Transform your existing space without the stress. We handle approvals, scheduling, and quality end-to-end.

page.heroSub: Transform your home or workplace without the stress — we manage everything.
page.intro: A renovation should improve your life, not complicate it. From kitchen and bathroom transformations to second-storey extensions, you deal with one contact throughout and get weekly updates.

steps.title: Site Assessment
steps.description: We visit your property and understand your goals before quoting.

steps.title: Detailed Quote
steps.description: Fully itemised quote — no hidden costs.

steps.title: Scheduled Build
steps.description: Work scheduled to minimise disruption, cleaned up daily.

steps.title: Final Inspection
steps.description: Walkthrough together; snag items resolved before sign-off.

items.question: Do I need council approval for a renovation?
items.answer: It depends on scope. Cosmetic work usually doesn't; structural or electrical changes often do. We advise at assessment stage.

items.question: Can I stay in my home during the renovation?
items.answer: Usually yes — we'll discuss this upfront so you can plan accordingly.

items.question: How long does a kitchen renovation take?
items.answer: A standard kitchen takes 2–4 weeks. Structural changes may take longer.

items.question: Do you handle all the trades?
items.answer: Yes — plumbing, electrical, tiling, joinery — all coordinated by us.

items.title: Project Management
items.description: Already have a team but need a reliable site manager? We coordinate trades, manage timelines, and keep your build moving.

page.heroSub: Your build runs to schedule when someone experienced is in charge.
page.intro: Large builds become complex fast. Our project management service gives you an experienced site manager without the overhead of a full management firm.

steps.title: Project Briefing
steps.description: We review your plans, programme, and budget.

steps.title: Programme Development
steps.description: Detailed construction programme prepared; trade packages locked in.

steps.title: Active Site Management
steps.description: Daily on-site presence, weekly meetings, immediate issue escalation.

steps.title: Completion & Handover
steps.description: Defects inspection and final documentation through to practical completion.

items.question: What size projects do you manage?
items.answer: Typically $200K–$5M. Contact us for larger or smaller projects.

items.question: Do you use your own trades or work with ours?
items.answer: Either — we can bring our network or integrate with your existing relationships.

items.question: How do you handle variations?
items.answer: All variations are documented and approved by you before work proceeds.

items.question: Can you take over a project that's already started?
items.answer: Yes — we've stepped into live builds before, starting with a thorough site review.

cta.headline: Need an Experienced Site Manager?
cta.subheadline: Let's talk about keeping your build on track.

items.title: Maintenance & Repairs
items.description: Fast, reliable maintenance for residential and commercial properties. No job too small.

page.heroSub: Fast response, quality workmanship — no job too small.
page.intro: Whether it's an overnight leak, storm damage, or a backlog of small jobs, our maintenance team responds quickly and gets things sorted properly the first time.

steps.title: Log the Job
steps.description: Call or email us. Urgent issues: on-site within 24 hours.

steps.title: Assessment & Quote
steps.description: Clear scope and price before starting.

steps.title: We Fix It
steps.description: Quality materials — not a patch that fails in 6 months.

steps.title: Follow-Up
steps.description: We check back to ensure everything is holding up.

items.question: How quickly can you respond to urgent repairs?
items.answer: Within 24 hours for urgent issues. Planned maintenance is scheduled based on availability.

items.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance contracts?
items.answer: Yes — for landlords, commercial property managers, and strata schemes.

items.question: What's your minimum call-out?
items.answer: No minimum job size, though travel charges apply for very small jobs outside inner Brisbane.

items.question: Can you handle insurance repair work?
items.answer: Yes — we can work directly with your insurer and provide detailed scopes for claims.

cta.subheadline: Get in touch and we'll have someone with you as soon as possible.

about.headline: Who We Are
about.body:
Acme Construction has been building homes and businesses across Brisbane since 2009. We started as a small team with a simple belief: great construction doesn't have to be complicated. Today, we're a team of 12 tradespeople and project managers who still operate by that same principle.

Every project we take on gets our full attention. We don't overbook, we don't cut corners, and we don't disappear after handover. If something isn't right, we fix it — full stop.

highlights.text: Brisbane-based team — we know local conditions

aboutPage.heroSub: 15 years of quality construction in Brisbane. Locally owned, locally trusted.

mission.headline: Our Mission
mission.text: To deliver construction projects that exceed expectations — on time, on budget, and built to last. We believe quality workmanship and transparent communication aren't optional extras, they're the baseline.

story.headline: Our Story
paragraphs: Acme Construction was founded in 2009 by two tradespeople who were tired of seeing clients let down by poor communication and cut corners. Starting with just a ute and a commitment to doing things properly, we grew through referrals alone for the first five years.

Today we're a team of 12 — builders, project managers, and support staff — but the ethos hasn't changed. Every job gets the same attention whether it's a bathroom renovation or a $2M commercial build. We still answer our own phones.
We're proudly Brisbane-based and have no plans to expand beyond what we can manage well. We'd rather be the best builder in our region than a mediocre one across three states.

items.title: Honest Communication
items.description: We tell you what's realistic, not what you want to hear. If there's a problem, you hear about it from us first.

items.title: Quality Workmanship
items.description: We take pride in the work we put our name to. Every detail matters, from footings to finishes.

items.title: Respect for Your Time
items.description: We show up when we say we will. If something changes, we tell you immediately.

items.title: Long-Term Thinking
items.description: We build relationships, not just buildings. Most of our work comes from returning clients and referrals.

items.text: Founded by two tradespeople with $40K and a ute.
Completed first commercial project — a 500m² office fitout in Fortitude Valley.
Grew to a team of 8 and moved into dedicated office space.
Reached 100 completed projects. Still zero defect claims.
Launched dedicated maintenance division to support past clients.
Team of 12. Over 200 projects delivered across Brisbane.

cta.headline: Want to Work With Us?
cta.subheadline: Get in touch for a free consultation — no obligation, no pressure.

team.headline: Meet the Team
team.subheadline: The people who show up, do the work, and answer the phone.

members.name: James Acme
members.bio: James co-founded Acme in 2009 after 10 years as a licensed builder. He oversees all project delivery and is still the first point of contact for new enquiries.

members.name: Sarah Nguyen
members.bio: Sarah manages day-to-day operations across our active sites. With 8 years of residential and commercial experience, she's the person who keeps builds running on schedule.

members.name: Tom Westley
members.bio: Tom has been with Acme since 2011 and leads our carpentry crew. His attention to detail on finishes is what sets our renovations apart.

members.name: Priya Sharma
members.bio: Priya keeps the business running behind the scenes — quoting, scheduling, accounts, and making sure clients always have someone to call.

careers.heroSub: We're always looking for skilled, reliable tradespeople who take pride in their work.
careers.intro: Acme Construction is a great place to build a career — not just houses. We offer consistent work, fair pay, and a team culture where your skills are respected and your input is valued. If you're reliable and quality-focused, we want to hear from you.

items.text: Consistent, year-round work — no slow season gaps
Fully compliant — super, insurance, and safe work practices
Opportunity to grow into senior and management roles
Small team — you're not just a number
Quality-focused projects you'll be proud of

applicationForm.headline: Get in Touch
applicationForm.subheadline: We're always open to hearing from skilled, reliable people. Send us your details and we'll keep you in mind.

projects.headline: Our Projects
projects.subheadline: A selection of residential and commercial work across Brisbane.

items.title: Paddington Home Extension
items.description: Second-storey addition to an existing Queenslander, adding three bedrooms and a full bathroom. Completed in 10 weeks with the family in residence throughout.

items.title: Fortitude Valley Office Fitout
items.description: Full fitout of a 450m² commercial office space including partitioning, joinery, flooring, and all electrical and data. Delivered on a tight 6-week programme.

items.title: New Farm Kitchen & Bathroom
items.description: Complete kitchen and bathroom renovation in a heritage-listed terrace. Custom joinery, Calacatta marble benchtops, and full re-tiling throughout.

items.title: Eagle Farm Industrial Shed
items.description: Design and construct of a 1,200m² industrial shed including concrete hardstand, three-phase power, and roller doors. Completed ahead of schedule.

items.title: Woolloongabba Townhouse
items.description: Construction of a three-bedroom, two-bathroom townhouse on a tight inner-city block. Includes a rooftop terrace and double garage.

items.title: West End Restaurant Strip
items.description: Fitout of four adjoining restaurant tenancies in a heritage building, including structural alterations, kitchen builds, and facade restoration.

process.headline: How It Works
process.subheadline: A simple, transparent process from first contact to final handover.

steps.title: Get in Touch
steps.description: Tell us about your project — a quick call or message is all it takes. We'll ask the right questions and put together a tailored quote.

steps.title: Quote & Plan
steps.description: A detailed, itemised quote with no surprises. Once you're happy, we lock in a start date and brief you on what to expect.

steps.title: We Build
steps.description: Our team gets to work. You'll receive regular updates and a direct line to your project manager throughout.

steps.title: Handover
steps.description: We do a thorough walkthrough together before signing off. Any snag items are resolved before we consider the job done.

whyUs.headline: Why Choose Us
whyUs.subheadline: What sets us apart from the rest.

items.title: Fixed-Price Quotes
items.description: You'll know exactly what you're paying before we start. No surprise line items.

items.title: Direct Communication
items.description: You deal with the same person from quote to handover. No call centres.

items.title: On-Time Delivery
items.description: We set realistic timelines and stick to them. If something comes up, you hear about it from us first.

items.title: Quality Guaranteed
items.description: All work is fully warranted. If something isn't right after we finish, we come back and fix it at no cost.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.text: Excellent work from start to finish. Finished on time, communicated well, and the quality was outstanding.

items.name: James T.
items.text: We've used Acme for three commercial fitouts now. Reliable, professional, and always transparent on pricing.

items.name: Karen L.
items.text: Our kitchen renovation was completed on time and exactly to spec. The team were respectful of our home throughout.

contact.headline: Get a Free Quote
contact.subheadline: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within one business day.
contact.confirmationMessage: Thanks — we'll be in touch within one business day.
